summary:
The dataset has been successfully pre-processed.

The cleaned dataset contains 9,659 rows and 8 columns. The columns include various identifiers (`internal_id`, `Award ID`, `generated_internal_id`), recipient information (`Recipient Name`), key dates (`Start Date`, `End Date`, `action_date`), and the financial value of each entry (`Award Amount`). This structure suggests the data pertains to financial awards or contracts, detailing who received them, for what duration, and for how much.
